{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Frozen Blade madra
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Frozen Blade madra]] exists in tiny shards that hang in midair to cut.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] used [[Frozen Blade madra]] and icy [[aura]] from her [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
